task_completion.description: Weasis application is open and displaying a DICOM image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis window is visible with a medical image loaded in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: The polyline measurement tool is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The polyline tool icon is highlighted in the Weasis toolbar or selected from a context menu.

task_completion.description: A polyline with at least 4 segments is drawn on the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: A continuous line with at least 5 vertices (which creates at least 4 segments) is visible on the DICOM image.

task_completion.description: The total path length measurement label is visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text label displaying the total length (value and unit) is shown attached to or near the drawn polyline.

task_completion.description: The required screenshot is saved to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or file manager showing 'polyline_screenshot.png' being saved or existing in '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/'.

task_completion.description: The text report is created with the required format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the content of 'polyline_report.txt' with exactly the lines: 'Tool: Polyline', 'Segments: <number>', 'Total Length: <value> <unit>', and 'Image: <filename>'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Weasis GUI to draw the polyline
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor movements, tool selection, and drawing actions occur within Weasis, rather than using an external image editor to draw lines.

integrity.description: The measurement values in the text report match the values shown on the Weasis measurement label
integrity.visual_evidence: The length value and segment count in the text editor exactly match the label visible in the Weasis viewer.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured from the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of a screenshot tool, command, or Weasis export feature rather than downloading a pre-made image or faking the file creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required screenshot path is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/polyline_screenshot.png' and the text report path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/polyline_report.txt'. The polyline must have at least 4 segments and a total length greater than 10.0.
